pages.text: The $(item)Jungle Temple Skyseed$() — $(item)two mossy cobblestone$() over $(item)jungle planks$() and a $(item)tripwire hook$(). A sealed room with two chests and a dispenser.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A sealed mossy cobblestone room with two loot chests and an arrow $(item)dispenser$() set into the wall. Break in and clear it out.

$(bold)Two chests and a dispenser$()$(br)The chests hold diamonds, emerald, gold and iron, bamboo and enchanted books; the dispenser is worth breaking for its arrows. Crafted from $(item)jungle planks$(), $(item)mossy cobblestone$() and a $(item)tripwire hook$().
